landing.onui.label: Onui
landing.onui.desc: : A Korean word referring to both 'older brother' and 'younger sister'.
landing.special.title:
Any sentence you want,
Immediate Pronunciation Coaching
landing.special.desc: Sentences not in the textbook are OK. Work emails, news headlines, drama lines—enter them yourself and the AI will precisely analyze by syllable and provide instant feedback.
landing.hero.title: Master Pronunciation · Conversation · Writing with AI Coach Onui
landing.hero.desc: AI-powered pronunciation analysis, step-by-step learning, and interactive games for effective Korean study.
landing.hero.card.label: AI Coach
landing.hero.card.name: Onui Assistant
landing.hero.chat.ai1: Welcome! Share your goal (pronunciation/conversation/writing) and I'll create a custom curriculum.
landing.hero.chat.user: I want to improve both pronunciation and conversation quickly. I can do 20 minutes daily.
landing.hero.chat.ai2: Perfect! Today: mouth shape/pronunciation → 5 short dialogues → feedback. Ready to start?
landing.engine.title: 🚀 AI Language Education Engine
landing.engine.desc1: The pronunciation evaluation system is used in pronunciation education and therapy fields to assess how accurately a specific word or sentence was pronounced.
landing.engine.desc2: By assigning scores to each consonant and vowel, it provides an accurate diagnosis of which pronunciations were incorrect and how well you are performing now.
landing.features.label: Core Features
landing.features.title: Onui's Unique Learning System
landing.features.desc: From pronunciation to real-world conversation and writing. AI cares for every step of your language journey.
landing.features.card1.title: Precision Speech Correction (SpeechPro)
landing.features.card1.desc: Not just good or bad. It analyzes tongue position, mouth shape, and accent in 0.1s to provide correction.
landing.features.card2.title: Big Data Vocab Diagnosis
landing.features.card2.desc: Diagnose your current level (A1-C2) based on 19,000+ words and provide a custom vocabulary book.
landing.features.card3.title: AI 1:1 Writing Tutor
landing.features.card3.desc: Beyond grammar fixes, it coaches on natural Korean expressions and nuances fitting the context.
landing.features.card4.title: Real Listening Training
landing.features.card4.desc: Listen and dictate TTS audio of various speeds/intonations to master particles and endings.
landing.features.card5.title: Logical Writing Coaching
landing.features.card5.desc: From diaries to essays, build logical thinking and advanced vocabulary skills through targeted writing.
landing.features.lms.title: AI Digital Textbook & LMS
landing.features.lms.desc: Based on our AI engine technology, we provide various language education services such as AI digital textbook platform development and AI LMS platform construction.
landing.showcase.label: Actual Screens
landing.showcase.title: Visualize Your Growth
landing.showcase.desc: Witness your improvement directly through daily accumulated data and precise analysis reports.
landing.showcase.card1.label: AI Precision Analysis
landing.showcase.card1.title: Visualizing Your Pronunciation
landing.showcase.card1.desc: Instead of abstract advice, see clear graphs of phoneme-level accuracy and areas for improvement.
landing.showcase.card2.label: Growth Report
landing.showcase.card2.title: Proven by Data
landing.showcase.card2.desc: Stay motivated with daily/monthly study volumes and score trends showing your consistency.
landing.steps.title: Most Efficient 3-Step Method
landing.steps.desc: Just follow our scientifically designed curriculum.
landing.steps.step1.label: STEP 1: Foundation
landing.steps.step1.title: Native Pronunciation
landing.steps.step1.desc: Internalize Korean rhythm and intonation through phoneme practice and shadowing.
landing.steps.step2.label: STEP 2: Application
landing.steps.step2.title: Immersive Gamification
landing.steps.step2.desc: Use vocabulary and sentences without boredom through quizzes, puzzles, and dictation games.
landing.steps.step3.label: STEP 3: Mastery
landing.steps.step3.title: Cultural Context
landing.steps.step3.desc: Deeply understand Korean culture and emotions beyond language through folktales and idioms.
landing.cta.label: Start Now
landing.cta.title: Time to Transform Your Korean
landing.cta.desc: Stop worrying alone. AI Coach Onui is here to help you master Korean.
landing.usp.label: Why ONUI
landing.usp.title: What Sets ONUI Apart
landing.usp.tech.title: Deep Learning Tunes Your Articulation Data
landing.usp.tech.desc: Beyond simple recognition. We fine-tune your articulation data with deep learning.
landing.usp.result.title: The Secret Behind SpeechPro 92
landing.usp.result.desc: AI 1:1 coaching that analyzes rhythm and breathing for measurable results.
landing.usp.engage.title: Feel the Temperature of Korean
landing.usp.engage.desc: From AI pronunciation to folktale learning — seamless language immersion.
landing.usp.trend.title: Fastest Path to Native Frequency
landing.usp.trend.desc: Achieve native-level naturalness fastest through AI guidance.
sentence.hero.title:
Any sentence,
Immediate Pronunciation Evaluation
sentence.hero.desc: Practice any sentence outside of textbooks. From work emails to travel phrases and drama lines—AI precisely analyzes your input by syllable and provides instant feedback.
sentence.input.label: ✍️ Enter a Korean sentence to practice
sentence.input.desc: Any sentence is fine. Try daily conversations, business expressions, or news sentences.
sentence.input.placeholder: e.g., The weather is great today. / Hello, nice to meet you!
sentence.display.label: 📌 Practice Sentence
sentence.display.empty: Enter a sentence above and click 'Start Practice' 👆
sentence.record.status: Please read the sentence through the microphone
sentence.result.title: 📊 Pronunciation Results
sentence.msg.no_sentence: Please select or enter a sentence first.
sentence.msg.mic_error: Cannot access microphone. Please check browser settings.
speechpro.title: AI Comprehensive Pronunciation Evaluation
speechpro.subtitle: Receive an accuracy score for your Korean pronunciation and get feedback for individual phonemes
speechpro.modal_overview_desc: SpeechPro provides precision analysis based on pronunciation models and comprehensive AI feedback.

speechpro.msg.select_sentence: Please select a sentence to evaluate
speechpro.msg.eval_timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
speechpro.table.row2.label: Accuracy

speechpro.table.row4.pro: Intensive learning based on strengths/areas to improve
speechpro.modal_strength_desc: Instantly see which sounds were incorrect
speechpro.modal_tip: TIP: After checking phoneme accuracy with SpeechPro, it's effective to practice natural speaking with FluencyPro.
speechpro.err_mic:
Voice was not delivered properly. Please record again.
(Check microphone connection)
speechpro.err_timeout:
Server response is delayed. Please try again later.
(Check network or try shorter sentences)
speechpro.err_no_result:
Could not recognize voice or no analysis result.
Please speak louder and clearer near the microphone.
speechpro.feedback_fair: Needs more practice. Keep it up! 📚
